score_impact: L6 went from 0% (dis-fallback only) to 75% (16/20 cases score 5/5)
known_issues: L6 cases 12 (file_io), 17 (generators), 18 (decorators), 19 (context_managers), 20 (dataclasses) fail: pylingual times out, crashes, or produces empty output. These are the harder cases that need a longer timeout, post-decompile cleanup, or a real LLM cleanup pass.
L2 (marshal) and L3 (zlib+marshal) are 0%: those are handled by the UNWRAP stage, not DECOMPILE. Unwrap doesn't currently handle those formats.
pylingual_cli_notes: Bare 'pylingual' in subprocess.run fails on Windows with [WinError 2].  Fixed in pyglimmer_toolkit/core/decompile.py:decompile_with_pylingual by resolving to absolute path via shutil.which.
